metadata.name: stg_youtube__channel_basic
metadata.comment: Provides user activity statistics related to a channel and its videos

_fivetran_id.name: _fivetran_id
_fivetran_id.comment: The unique ID of the record generated by Fivetran

date_day.name: date_day
date_day.comment: The date the video was viewed

_fivetran_synced.name: _fivetran_synced
_fivetran_synced.comment: Timestamp of when the record was synced by Fivetran

average_view_duration_percentage.name: average_view_duration_percentage
average_view_duration_percentage.comment: Average view duration calculated as a percentage

average_view_duration_seconds.name: average_view_duration_seconds
average_view_duration_seconds.comment: Average view duration calculated in seconds

channel_id.name: channel_id
channel_id.comment: Unique identifier of the video channel

comments.name: comments
comments.comment: Number of comments the posted towards the video

dislikes.name: dislikes
dislikes.comment: Number of dislikes the video received

likes.name: likes
likes.comment: Number of likes the video received

shares.name: shares
shares.comment: Number of times the video was shared

views.name: views
views.comment: Number of views the video received

watch_time_minutes.name: watch_time_minutes
watch_time_minutes.comment: Total watch time the video received in minutes

source_relation.name: source_relation
source_relation.comment: The source of the record, if the unioning functionality is being used.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: stg_youtube__channel_demographics
metadata.comment: Provides user activity statistics related to a channel and its videos

_fivetran_id.name: _fivetran_id
_fivetran_id.comment: The unique ID of the record generated by Fivetran

video_id.name: video_id
video_id.comment: Unique reference ID of the video

channel_id.name: channel_id
channel_id.comment: Reference of channel which the video belongs

age_group.name: age_group
age_group.comment: The age group the individual. Ranges follow the format of 'AGE_[min age]_[max age]'

country_code.name: country_code
country_code.comment: Country code where the individual who watched the video is located

gender.name: gender
gender.comment: Gender of the user who watched the video. Either 'MALE', 'FEMALE', 'USER_SPECIFIED', or (outdated) 'GENDER_OTHER'. 'USER_SPECIFIED' has replaced 'GENDER_OTHER'.

live_or_on_demand.name: live_or_on_demand
live_or_on_demand.comment: Indicates if the video was watched live or on demand. Either 'live' or 'on_demand'

subscribed_status.name: subscribed_status
subscribed_status.comment: Indicates if the viewer was subscribed when watching the video. Either 'not_subscribed' or 'subscribed'

views_percentage.name: views_percentage
views_percentage.comment: Total percent of views the user makes up for the video

_fivetran_synced.name: _fivetran_synced
_fivetran_synced.comment: Timestamp of when the record was synced by Fivetran

source_relation.name: source_relation
source_relation.comment: The source of the record, if the unioning functionality is being used.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: stg_youtube__video
metadata.comment: Table containing individual video metadata such as the title, channel, description, thumbnails, and other video information.

video_published_at.name: video_published_at
video_published_at.comment: Timestamp of when the video was published

channel_title.name: channel_title
channel_title.comment: Title of the channel which the video belongs

video_category_id.name: video_category_id
video_category_id.comment: Lookup id of the video category

channel_id.name: channel_id
channel_id.comment: Lookup id of the video channel

video_default_audio_language.name: video_default_audio_language
video_default_audio_language.comment: Identifies the default audio language of the video video

video_default_language.name: video_default_language
video_default_language.comment: Identifies the default language of the video video

video_live_broadcast_content.name: video_live_broadcast_content
video_live_broadcast_content.comment: The content of the live broadcast

video_localized.name: video_localized
video_localized.comment: json object containing the localized video details

content_details_caption.name: content_details_caption
content_details_caption.comment: Boolean indicating if the video contains captions

content_details_definition.name: content_details_definition
content_details_definition.comment: Identifies the details of the available definition of the video (ie. hd, sd, etc.)

content_details_dimension.name: content_details_dimension
content_details_dimension.comment: Identifies the dimension of the video (ie. 2d)

content_details_duration.name: content_details_duration
content_details_duration.comment: Identifies the duration of the video

content_details_has_custom_thumbnail.name: content_details_has_custom_thumbnail
content_details_has_custom_thumbnail.comment: Boolean indicating if the video has a custom thumbnail

content_details_licensed_content.name: content_details_licensed_content
content_details_licensed_content.comment: Boolean indicating if the video has licensed content

content_details_projection.name: content_details_projection
content_details_projection.comment: Identifies the projection type of the video

content_details_region_restriction.name: content_details_region_restriction
content_details_region_restriction.comment: Identifies the region restrictions of the video

kind.name: kind
kind.comment: Identifies the type of video (ie. video, short, etc.)

player_embed_height.name: player_embed_height
player_embed_height.comment: The height of the embedded video player

player_embed_html.name: player_embed_html
player_embed_html.comment: The html used for the embedded video

player_embed_width.name: player_embed_width
player_embed_width.comment: The width of the embedded video player

privacy_status.name: privacy_status
privacy_status.comment: Identifies if the video is either `public`, `private`, or `unlisted`.

statistics_comment_count.name: statistics_comment_count
statistics_comment_count.comment: Count of comments on the video

statistics_dislike_count.name: statistics_dislike_count
statistics_dislike_count.comment: Count of dislikes on the video

statistics_favorite_count.name: statistics_favorite_count
statistics_favorite_count.comment: Count of favorites on the video

statistics_like_count.name: statistics_like_count
statistics_like_count.comment: Count of likes on the video

statistics_view_count.name: statistics_view_count
statistics_view_count.comment: Count of total views on the video

status_embeddable.name: status_embeddable
status_embeddable.comment: Boolean if the video is able to be embedded

status_failure_reason.name: status_failure_reason
status_failure_reason.comment: Reason for video failure if provided

status_made_for_kids.name: status_made_for_kids
status_made_for_kids.comment: Boolean indicating if the video was made for kids

status_public_stats_viewable.name: status_public_stats_viewable
status_public_stats_viewable.comment: Boolean indicating if the stats for the video are made public

status_publish_at.name: status_publish_at
status_publish_at.comment: Timestamp of when the video was published

status_rejection_reason.name: status_rejection_reason
status_rejection_reason.comment: Description of the rejection reason for the video if applicable

status_self_declared_made_for_kids.name: status_self_declared_made_for_kids
status_self_declared_made_for_kids.comment: Boolean indicating if the video is self declaring that is is made for kids

_fivetran_synced.name: _fivetran_synced
_fivetran_synced.comment: Timestamp of when the record was synced by Fivetran

source_relation.name: source_relation
source_relation.comment: The source of the record, if the unioning functionality is being used.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

age_13_17_view_percentage.name: age_13_17_view_percentage
age_13_17_view_percentage.comment: Total number of views percent attributed to the age range 13 - 17 years old

age_18_24_view_percentage.name: age_18_24_view_percentage
age_18_24_view_percentage.comment: Total number of views percent attributed to the age range 18 - 24 years old

age_35_44_view_percentage.name: age_35_44_view_percentage
age_35_44_view_percentage.comment: Total number of views percent attributed to the age range 35 - 44 years old

age_25_34_view_percentage.name: age_25_34_view_percentage
age_25_34_view_percentage.comment: Total number of views percent attributed to the age range 25 - 34 years old

age_45_54_view_percentage.name: age_45_54_view_percentage
age_45_54_view_percentage.comment: Total number of views percent attributed to the age range 45 - 54 years old

age_55_64_view_percentage.name: age_55_64_view_percentage
age_55_64_view_percentage.comment: Total number of views percent attributed to the age range 55 - 64 years old

age_group.name: age_group

country_code.comment: Country code where the individual who watched the video is located

gender.name: gender

metadata.name: youtube__gender_demographics_pivot
metadata.comment: Each record represents a daily video view percentage with the gender options pivoted out for quicker analysis.

date_day.name: date_day
date_day.comment: The date the video was viewed

source_relation.name: source_relation
source_relation.comment: The source of the record, if the unioning functionality is being used.

video_published_at.name: video_published_at
video_published_at.comment: Timestamp of when the video was published

male_view_percentage.name: male_view_percentage
male_view_percentage.comment: Total number of views percent attributed to the viewers who identify as male

female_view_percentage.name: female_view_percentage
female_view_percentage.comment: Total number of views percent attributed to the viewers who identify as female

gender_other_view_percentage.name: gender_other_view_percentage
gender_other_view_percentage.comment: (DEPRECATED) Total number of views percent attributed to the viewers who identify as neither male or female. This column has been replaced by `user_specified_view_percentage`.

user_specified_view_percentage.name: user_specified_view_percentage
user_specified_view_percentage.comment: Total number of views percent attributed to the viewers who have specified their gender. This has replaced the `gender_other_view_percentage` column.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: youtube__video_report
metadata.comment: Each record represents the daily aggregation of your YouTube video performance.

date_day.name: date_day
date_day.comment: The date the video was viewed

channel_id.name: channel_id
channel_id.comment: Unique identifier of the video channel

source_relation.name: source_relation
source_relation.comment: The source of the record, if the unioning functionality is being used.

video_published_at.name: video_published_at
video_published_at.comment: Timestamp of when the video was published

average_view_duration_percentage.name: average_view_duration_percentage
average_view_duration_percentage.comment: Average duration of views represented as a percent of the entire length of the video

average_view_duration_seconds.name: average_view_duration_seconds
average_view_duration_seconds.comment: Average duration of views for the video in seconds

comments.name: comments
comments.comment: Total number of comment posted on the video

dislikes.name: dislikes
dislikes.comment: Total number of dislikes attributed to the video

likes.name: likes
likes.comment: Total number of likes attributed to the video

shares.name: shares
shares.comment: Total number of times the video was shared

subscribers_gained.name: subscribers_gained
subscribers_gained.comment: Total subscribers gained from the video

subscribers_lost.name: subscribers_lost
subscribers_lost.comment: Total subscribers lost from the video

views.name: views
views.comment: Total number of views the video received

watch_time_minutes.name: watch_time_minutes
watch_time_minutes.comment: Total watch time in minutes the video received

video_duration_seconds.name: video_duration_seconds
video_duration_seconds.comment: The total duration of the video in seconds

daily_video_id.name: daily_video_id
daily_video_id.comment: Unique identifier which represents a composite key made up of the date_day and video_id.
